known_gaps: Numeric limits in LIMITS.md (wake frequency, cycle caps, cost ceiling mechanism) are conservative starting defaults reasoned from existing ratified numbers elsewhere in this repo, not yet empirically validated against a running kernel -- explicitly disclosed in LIMITS.md's own calibration-disclosure note and flagged in this lane's report to the orchestrator/PM.

The kernel's own execution-state artifact's canonical file path is deliberately left to AUT-2 to choose (only its distinctness from the existing ops:execution-state report is mandated) -- see COMPATIBILITY_MAP.md naming caveat.

Whether /loop-dispatch is eventually replaced (not just wrapped) by the scheduled kernel is explicitly left as a later, separate PM-gated decision -- COMPATIBILITY_MAP.md does not resolve this, by design.
